news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: When Trump threatens us again, we will fight back. We will fight back with everything we have to get the best deal for Canada.
Canada's PM Carney: The old relationship we had with the US, based on deepening integration of our economies and tight security and military cooperation, is over.
Global Policy Advisors released a report on rare earths tying to U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund, following an Executive Order on increasing American mineral production. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: In New York on March 27, 2025, Global Policy Advisors LLC (GPA), an expert in sovereign wealth strategies and institutional investments, published a new report titled "Strategic Metals, Rare Earths: The Role of Development Finance Corporation in a Resource-Backed U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund." This report delves into the potential of critical minerals and rare earths, which were emphasized in the Executive Order dated March 20, 2025, focusing on "Immediate Measures to Increase American Mineral Production." Although the Executive Order does not explicitly mention a Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF), GPA's analysis indicates a strong indication towards its development. For the complete story, refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Buying an all-American car is difficult due to high costs and low availability of domestic parts.
Canada's PM Carney: We will do everything in our power to protect our businesses.
Canada's PM Carney: The road ahead will be long. There is no silver bullet, there is no quick fix.
Canada's PM Carney: Nothing is off the table when it comes to defending our workers and our country.
Canada's PM Carney: I will speak to Premiers on Friday as well as business and union leaders to develop a coordinated response to what Trump does on April 2nd.
Alzheimer's tests using video games may detect disease early, as effective as blood tests, boosting clinical trials._CREATED: Rutgers-Newark researchers.
news.summary: In Newark, New Jersey, on March 27, 2025, Alzheimer's researchers at Rutgers University-Newark have developed early detection tests utilizing video games. These tests have the potential to detect the disease several years before symptoms manifest, offering a non-invasive method for diagnosis.

news.headline: Indiana University Chancellor and President Emeritus, Michael A. McRobbie, joins CIEE Board of Directors, enhancing global education efforts.
news.summary: In South Portland, Maine on March 27, 2025, the Council on International Educational Exchange (CIEE), a prominent nonprofit specializing in study abroad and international exchange, which has been facilitating connections among individuals, nations, and cultures since 1947, announced Indiana University as its latest board member.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: It is possible that with comprehensive negotiations, we will be able to restore some trust with the United States.
Canada's PM Carney: Trump reached out on Wednesday night to schedule a call.
Avangrid Foundation aided 89 charitable organizations in 2024, advancing sustainability and equity. CEO Azagra commended diverse efforts.
news.summary: Orange, Connecticut-- The Avangrid Foundation, associated with Avangrid Inc., a subsidiary of the Iberdrola Group, revealed its backing of 89 charitable institutions in 2024. The foundation's contributions aim to foster a sustainable and fair future for all. Avangrid's CEO, Pedro Azagra, praised the foundation's achievements in conjunction with partner organizations nationwide.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: Our response to these latest tariffs is to fight.
Canada's PM Carney: We will fight the US tariffs with retaliatory trade actions of our own.
Canada's PM Carney: It is clear that the United States is no longer a reliable partner.
ChatGPT's latest update allows users to easily create Studio Ghibli-style animations, leading to a surge in social media posts.
news.summary: A recent enhancement to ChatGPT has enabled users to replicate the artistic style of legendary animator Hayao Miyazaki. This update has sparked a surge in memes on social media platforms, with thousands of users taking advantage of the feature to create animations inspired by Miyazaki.

news.headline: New DLC pack for Sins of a Solar Empire II now available with 10+ scenario maps; Free v1.4 update includes Population Mechanic.
news.summary: A recently released downloadable content pack for a highly praised strategy game offers over 10 scenario maps with objective-driven gameplay. Additionally, a free version 1.4 update has introduced the Population Mechanic. This new feature challenges players to strategize like never before. The DLC pack is receiving positive reviews for enhancing the gaming experience.

news.headline: Virgin Atlantic opens new Clubhouse at LAX focused on pre-flight wellness and relaxation. Their sixth lounge includes features to help guests unwind before their flights.
news.summary: Virgin Atlantic has recently introduced its latest Clubhouse at Los Angeles International Airport, marking the sixth lounge in its expanding collection. The new Clubhouse is tailored to the health and wellness preferences of LA passengers, incorporating various amenities designed to help guests relax before their flights.

news.headline: Joy AI Tablet App now addresses senior care challenges, available on App Store & Google Play. Orange County, Mar 27, 2025.
news.summary: Joy AI tablet apps aiming to address the growing issues of caregiver shortages, loneliness, and isolation among seniors are now accessible on both the App Store and Google Play. Developed in Orange County, California, these apps offer effective solutions to these prevalent problems. Launched on March 27, 2025, the apps have been designed to provide support and assistance to seniors and their caregivers in the face of increasing challenges. This innovative technology seeks to bridge the gap in caregiving services and combat feelings of loneliness and isolation among the elderly. The apps have garnered attention for their potential impact in tackling these pressing issues.

news.headline: Coherent Corp unveils industry's first 400G D-EML at OFC 2025, setting new standards in laser technology.
news.summary: At the OFC 2025 event, Coherent Corp. is showcasing the pioneering 400 Gb/s Differential Electro-absorption Modulated Laser (D-EML). This marks a significant advancement in the industry's technology, with impressive data transmission capabilities of 400 gigabits per second.

news.headline: Hermès International announces release of 2024 Universal Registration Document to public.
GameStop's market cap drops $3B amid doubts on BTC plan, stock falls 24% after announcement to use $1.3B for Bitcoin. Source: Google Finance.
news.summary: GameStop's market capitalization dropped by nearly $3 billion on March 27 after announcing plans to buy Bitcoin using proceeds from a $1.3 billion debt offering. The news initially boosted shares by 12% but later led to a 24% decline. Analysts suggest investor skepticism about GameStop's strategy to use Bitcoin to mask deeper business issues. Additionally, Bitcoin's price fell to $87,000 on March 27 amidst concerns over macroeconomic instability. Companies like Strategy have seen success with Bitcoin treasuries, prompting others to follow suit, with public companies now collectively holding nearly $58 billion in Bitcoin as of that date.

news.headline: The Doctors Company declares $15.1 million dividend, reaching total of $485 million in declared dividends.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in NAPA, California, The Doctors Company, the biggest physician-owned medical malpractice insurer in the country, revealed the approval of a premium dividend for 2025 totaling around $15.1 million. This latest dividend brings the total declared dividends up to $485 million thus far.

news.headline: AI expert Pau Aleikum Garcia discusses AI-built memories on Info-Tech's Digital Disruption podcast in 5th episode.
news.summary: In the latest installment of the podcast series "Digital Disruption" by Info-Tech Research Group, the fifth episode features a discussion with Pau Aleikum Garcia regarding the nexus of data, memory, and identity. Garcia shares insights into the pioneering project on "synthetic memories," emphasizing the innovative approach to blending these elements.

news.headline: Tesla's market value surged by $14 billion, overshadowing a downturn in other auto stocks.
Erdogan's hefty cash reserves sustain him through severe crisis, maintaining stability. #Erdogan #crisis #cashreserve
Analysis of Saudi Arabian data centers: 33 existing, 42 upcoming; existing capacity over 300 MW, upcoming 2.2 GW by 2025.
news.summary: A report on Saudi Arabia's data center market has been added to a database, offering insights on colocation centers. The country currently has over 300 MW of existing data center capacity, with an estimated upcoming capacity of about 2.2 GW. By the end of 2025, approximately 230 MW of additional power capacity is projected to be added.

news.headline: Iran’s Foreign Minster: Tehran has sent a response to Trump's letter through oman - IRNA.
Takara Sake USA partners with San Francisco Giants through 2028. Second MLB partnership, following New York Mets.
news.summary: Based in Berkeley, California, Takara Sake USA Inc. has announced its official sponsorship of the San Francisco Giants, joining forces with the MLB team. Following a similar partnership with the New York Mets, this collaboration signifies Takara's second venture with a Major League Baseball franchise. The President and CEO of Takara, Kaoru Hasumi, expressed enthusiasm about the association with their hometown team, highlighting the shared roots in Berkeley. The San Francisco Giants, renowned as one of the oldest and successful teams, now have Takara as a sponsor, further solidifying their presence in the Bay Area.

news.headline: NFL and WePlay Studios to launch NFL Offsides, a weekly online game show with NFL players and creators, premiering April 15.
news.summary: NFL players and gaming influencers will face off in a groundbreaking online game show called NFL Offsides, set to debut on April 15. The collaboration between the National Football League and WePlay Studios will bring together prominent figures from both worlds to compete in a series of challenges. This unique show is set to attract a wide audience, with the premiere scheduled for April 15 in New York and Los Angeles. Stay tuned for an exciting competition that combines the talents of NFL players and gaming creators.

news.headline: Successful debut of Barolo & Barbaresco World Opening in Austin, TX marks milestone for Langhe wines in U.S. - AUSTIN, Texas, March 27, 2025
news.summary: The Consorzio's first Southwest edition was a success, showcasing the increasing popularity of Langhe wines in the U.S. Held in Austin, Texas on March 25, 2025, the Barolo & Barbaresco World Opening event exhibited a dynamic itinerant format, highlighting the Consorzio's expanding influence. This debut edition attracted a significant number of attendees and indicated a growing appreciation for Langhe wines, emphasizing the increasing demand for these products in the U.S.

news.headline: Fertility Specialists of Texas introduces time-lapse incubator and CHLOE Viewer tech for enhanced family planning.
news.summary: In a recent press release from Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas on March 27, 2025, Fertility Specialists of Texas (FST) unveiled their latest innovation, the time-lapse incubator and CHLOE Viewer technology. This groundbreaking advancement merges scientific accuracy with emotional bonding, providing a more intimate experience for users. The new technology aims to revolutionize the fertility industry by offering enhanced precision and emotional connectivity. This significant development highlights FST's commitment to pushing boundaries in reproductive technology.

news.headline: AAHRPP accredits two int'l organizations, including first in UAE: Academia Sinica in Taiwan and Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the Association for the Accreditation of Human Research Protection Programs granted accreditation to two additional international institutions. The newly accredited organizations are Academia Sinica in Taiwan and Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi in the United Arab Emirates. Notably, Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi is the first research organization in the UAE to receive this accreditation. This achievement highlights the commitment of these institutions to ensuring high standards in human research protection.

news.headline: 50% off MocPOGO, the best Pokémon GO Spoofer, for Might and Mastery Event 2025. Exciting season from March 4 to June 3.
news.summary: On March 4, 2025, the Might and Mastery Event officially began in Pokémon GO, scheduled to run until June 3, 2025. This event has garnered excitement among trainers globally as it promises legendary encounters, intense Dynamax and Gigantamax battles, the introduction of new Galar region Pokémon, and more.

news.headline: Prime Biome warns of fake listings as counterfeit market grows; unauthorized sellers peddle non-official products.
news.summary: In Norfolk, Virginia, on March 27, 2025, the company associated with Prime Biome released a statement cautioning the public about unauthorized third-party sellers selling the product inaccurately on the internet. Numerous instances have been reported of unapproved retailers offering counterfeit versions of Prime Biome on multiple platforms.

news.headline: FTX founder SBF sent to Oklahoma on 'Con Air' after unauthorized jail interview. He lands at transfer center in <1 month post-Tucker Carlson appearance.
news.summary: The controversial cryptocurrency tycoon has been transferred to a prison facility within a month of his appearance on Tucker Carlson's conservative show.

news.headline: Senator Kennedy questions SEC nominee Paul Atkins on potential SBF pardon in Senate Banking hearing. Atkins urged to prevent any pardons for SBF following reports of pardon request from SBF’s parents. SBFS unlikely to secure pardon due to differences in case compared to Silk Road founder. SBF in solitary confinement after unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson. Magazine: Legal complications in FBI’s creation of fake crypto tokens.
news.summary: In a Senate Banking Committee hearing, US Senator John Kennedy questioned prospective SEC chairman Paul Atkins regarding potential pardons for Sam “SBF” Bankman-Fried, former FTX CEO. Kennedy raised concerns about donations made by Bankman-Fried’s family to Stanford University and urged the SEC to prevent any potential pardons. Reports surfaced that SBF's parents sought a pardon from President Trump, but experts believe it is unlikely due to differences from the Ross Ulbricht case. Ulbricht's victimless crimes contrast with SBF's potential investor losses, making a pardon improbable. SBF's attempts to sway Republicans through media interviews have landed him in solitary confinement following an unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson. The episode highlights legal complexities arising from the FBI's creation of fake crypto tokens.

news.headline: Arca Continental Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages wins Coca-Cola Market Street Challenge for the third time.
news.summary: Arca Continental Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages, located in Dallas, has emerged victorious in the Coca-Cola Market Street Challenge for the third consecutive time. This prestigious recognition showcases their dominance in the industry, highlighting their exceptional performance and commitment to excellence. This reiterates their unmatched expertise in the market, solidifying their position as a leader in the beverage sector. Congratulations to Arca Continental Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages for this remarkable achievement.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $74.03/bbl, up 24 cents, 0.33 %.
Cardano (ADA) rises by 11% in 30 days, currently priced at $0.7326 with a market cap of $25.8 billion. Analysts predict a potential 10x spike soon as bullish sentiment grows.
news.summary: Cardano's (ADA) price has surged by 11% over the past 30 days, with a current value of $0.7326 and a market capitalization of $25.8 billion. In the last 24 hours, the currency has seen a minor increase of 0.2%, and over the past week, it has risen by 1.7%. Bitcoin (BTC) is currently priced at $87,050.50 with a market cap of $1.7 trillion, showcasing a 0.5% increase in the last day and a 3.3% increase over the week. Ethereum (ETH) stands at $2,004.15 with a market cap of $241.8 billion, experiencing a slight decrease of 0.2% in the last 24 hours, but a growth of 1.4% in the past week. A crypto trader named AllinCrypto has pointed out that Cardano seems promising based on technical and fundamental analysis, suggesting a potential 10x spike in the near future. Another trader anticipates a rally if a breakout occurs. This bullish trend has led to increased optimism on social media regarding Cardano's future performance.

news.headline: El Pollo Loco hosts 3-day Burrito Block Party from April 2-4 with exclusive deals for Loco Rewards members. Win a Burrito Bag!
news.summary: From April 2nd to April 4th, El Pollo Loco is hosting a 3-day Burrito Block Party, featuring special offers for Loco Rewards members. Participants can enjoy exclusive discounts on burritos, enter giveaways, and have the opportunity to win a coveted Burrito Bag. Take part in this limited-time event to indulge in delicious burritos and potentially walk away with exciting prizes.

news.headline: Meta Earth, a modular blockchain project, to hold official launch event at Token2049 Dubai from April 30 to May 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on March 27, 2025, it was announced that Meta Earth, a modular blockchain project, will hold its official launch event during Token2049 Dubai from April 30 to May 1, 2025. Being the exclusive modular blockchain featured among the title and platinum sponsors, Meta Earth has garnered considerable attention.

news.headline: Akima promotes Jon Stringfield to GM of Arctic Peak, a construction subsidiary serving federal government clients.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, a leading provider of products and services to the federal government, Akima, has recently promoted Jon Stringfield to the position of general manager at Arctic Peak. The subsidiary focuses on offering construction services tailored for government projects. This announcement was made on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Oracle recognized as a leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Source-to-Pay Suites, with advanced AI & analytics.
news.summary: Oracle Fusion Cloud Procurement has been recognized as a top SaaS source-to-pay solution, thanks to its advanced AI and analytics capabilities. The company was recently named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Source-to-Pay Suites. The designation solidifies Oracle's position as a standard-bearer in the industry. This achievement highlights Oracle's commitment to driving innovation and providing cutting-edge solutions. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on March 27, 2025, and signifies Oracle's ongoing success in the market. This recognition underscores the effectiveness of Oracle Fusion Cloud Procurement in streamlining processes and delivering value to customers.

news.headline: The EU mulls changes to energy laws in a drive to cut red tape.
Mentor Capital acquires 25.127 net royalty acres in West Texas Permian Basin, equal to 12.5% of oil and gas revenues; 10-barrel production average in 6 months.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Mentor Capital, Inc. revealed its acquisition of a 25.127 net royalty acre segment of a productive project in the West Texas Permian Basin through an all-cash deal. This project encompasses 71 wells. Mentor now holds a 12.5% royalty interest in oil and gas revenues from its acreage, without any expenditure responsibilities. Over the last six months, the recorded average production for Mentor's segment has been 10 barrels.

news.headline: Oil and gas executives criticize Trump's focus on increasing domestic drilling, calling for stability. Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas survey reveals industry leaders' frustration with Trump admin.
news.summary: President Donald Trump's 2024 campaign focused on reducing prices amidst rising inflation. He emphasized increased domestic drilling as a solution, contrary to the Biden Administration's efforts for enhanced domestic energy independence. Recently, the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas published a quarterly survey of oil and gas industry leaders. The survey revealed their growing impatience with the Trump Administration due to perceived chaos and inefficiency. The executives were vocal about their frustration, highlighting concerns about the administration's impact on the sector's stability.

news.headline: Liberty Energy (NYSE: LBRT) stock boosted by Morgan Stanley upgrade to Overweight, price target raised from $20 to $25. Bullish on PGS.
news.summary: Shares of Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE:LBRT) saw an increase in trading value as Morgan Stanley's analyst Daniel Kutz upped the stock rating from Equal-Weight to Overweight. The price forecast was also adjusted from $20 to $25, showing an optimistic outlook. The upgrade was primarily driven by the potential earnings from the recently introduced Power Gen Services (PGS) division. It was noted that the company is not yet fully benefiting from the valuation of these investments. Furthermore, there is a possibility that the fundamentals of the CS business segment are stabilizing, hinting at a potential market floor. The detailed story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cineverse partners with Iconic Events Releasing for The Toxic Avenger's theatrical return after Terrifier sequels gross $65M+.
news.summary: Cineverse, a cutting-edge entertainment studio, has struck a deal with horror platform Bloody Disgusting following the impressive performances of Terrifier 2 and Terrifier 3. These films have raked in over $65 million combined at the domestic box office. The agreement comes as Cineverse (Nasdaq: CNVS) aims to expand its presence in the genre.
